prompt: A soft, muted monochrome anime-style illustration of a tired young woman lounging indoors in a quiet room, drawn with delicate sketchy linework and flat subdued shading in warm gray-beige tones. She has long dark brown to nearly black hair with wispy loose strands and soft bangs, pale skin, and half-lidded weary eyes. Her expression is drained and absent-minded, with a slight pout and a feeling of emotional exhaustion. She is slouching sideways in a chair or sofa, leaning her head into one hand with her elbow propped up, her posture loose and unguarded, giving a natural "all the tension has left her body" feeling. She wears an oversized dark charcoal off-shoulder long-sleeve sweatshirt slipping down on one side, exposing one shoulder and collarbone, with a relaxed baggy silhouette. In the foreground is a round table with a plain light-colored mug, 2 small paper wrappers or notes, and 1 small rectangular piece of chocolate. On the left side of the room is a simple vase holding several leafy branches on a small surface. A small hanging note on the wall reads "おつかれわたし". A thought bubble near her head reads "なんもしたくな〜い". The composition is vertical and intimate, like a casual lifestyle illustration or mood drawing, with lots of negative space, a minimalist background, understated domestic details, and a calm, sleepy, emotionally worn-out atmosphere.
